name: Contra Consensus (Tight Deep Book)
hypothesis: The parent spec (iter018_contra_consensus) proved a highly effective contra-signal (WR 93.4%) by combining a dense ask wall with deep-book selling pressure. Feedback suggested tightening thresholds. While the improver targeted 'ask_depth_concentration', this mutation tightens the other component, 'obi_ex_bbo', from 0.3 to 0.4. This tests if deep-book pressure is the more sensitive parameter for improving signal conviction.
mutation_note: Tightened the 'obi_ex_bbo' threshold from 0.3 to 0.4, following feedback to isolate a higher-conviction subset of trades.
